title: Aspidogyne stenocentron
taxonomy: Aspidogyne stenocentron is classified as a species of flowering plant in the genus Aspidogyne, which is a part of the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The genus Aspidogyne is a small group of terrestrial orchids that are primarily found in Southeast Asia. Aspidogyne stenocentron is native to Borneo, specifically in the Malaysian state of Sabah. It is a relatively rare species that is still being studied and documented by botanists. The classification of Aspidogyne stenocentron reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the orchid family.
